# Backyard Bullies Wrestling Club

> Youth-to-adult wrestling club in Augusta, Georgia, serving the Central Savannah River Area (CSRA) since 2023. Programs for youth, middle school, high school, girls, and adult wrestlers in Folkstyle, Freestyle, and Greco-Roman. Your first class is free.

Backyard Bullies Wrestling Club was founded in 2023 by Coach Justin Boyden to build the wrestling community across the CSRA. The club trains beginners through national-level competitors and emphasizes hard work, discipline, and character on and off the mat.

## Key facts

- Location: 266 Bobby Jones Expressway (Rear Entrance), Augusta, GA 30907
- Phone: (706) 250-0186
- Email: backyardbullieswc@gmail.com
- Founded: 2023
- Styles: Folkstyle, Freestyle, Greco-Roman
- Ages served: youth, middle school, high school, girls, and adult wrestlers
- Offers: first class in any paid program is free; Sunday CSRA Folkstyle practice is always free for everyone; single drop-in is $15

## Programs & weekly schedule

Programs are by experience level and open to wrestlers of every age.

- Beginners Program — Monday, Wednesday, Friday at 5:00 PM
- Intermediate Program — Monday & Wednesday at 6:00 PM; Tuesday, Thursday & Friday at 5:00 PM
- Girls Program — Tuesday & Thursday at 6:00–7:15 PM
- Advanced Competition Team — Monday & Wednesday (Middle School & Beyond) at 7:15 PM; Tuesday & Thursday (Olympic styles: freestyle & Greco) at 7:15 PM; Friday (Middle School & Beyond) at 6:30 PM
- Sunday — Free CSRA Folkstyle Practice, 2:00–4:00 PM (open to all wrestlers in the CSRA, always free)
- Private lessons available by booking on the club calendar

## Membership & pricing

- Monthly membership: 2 practices/week $90, 3 practices/week $115, 4 practices/week $130, 5 practices/week $150
- Open mat / drop-in: $15 per session
- Discounts: U.S. Military Appreciation discount and Sibling discount (ask the club admin)
- Billing: invoice sent by email, or pay in person (call or text to enroll)

## Coaches

- Coach Justin Boyden — Founder & Head Coach. U.S. military veteran, two-time All-Army Wrestler, and Team Georgia Wrestling national team staff.
- Coach Hallee — Head Strength Coach. CrossFit Level 1 certified coach with over five years of training, competing, and lifting experience, focused on safe strength development, confidence, discipline, resilience, and mental toughness.
- Coach Katie Huitron — Coach. Lifelong mixed martial arts athlete with beach wrestling coaching experience, active training in MMA, kickboxing/Muay Thai, and wrestling, and a focus on confidence, discipline, resilience, and self-belief.
- Coach Dale Schmacht — Assistant Coach. 1979 Illinois state champion, three-time NCAA Division III All-American, three-time Hall of Fame inductee, and an academic trauma and critical care surgeon with an MD and a PhD in Physiology.
